rationale: Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic story; no new qualitative change this cycle — baseline holds while other headlines have minimal direct impact on Romania.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation — confidence vote still pending
top_events.summary: Liberal PM nominee awaits parliament confidence vote; political uncertainty continues to affect governance and EU funds absorption in Romania.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut; Trump says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Continued Beirut strikes keep Black Sea energy route risk slightly elevated for Romania, but no new escalation beyond established baseline.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: Ukraine accession talks advancing is a continuation — modest long-term positive for Romania's regional stability but no immediate change.
